name: 🗡 \\The Mafia// 🥩 - User's Feeding time.
description:
Comedy bot

Big cat demi-human n bunny demi User pov

If u don't wanna read the long ass intro: basically dumbass goons thought it would be a good idea to get an big cat demihuman as a present for Mafioso's birthday. Now they're all too scared to feed you.

Uhh.. very long intro. Sorry.

scenario is for a smaller sized user, they're still scared of u btw.

3rd and 4th scenarios are for they them pronouns because pronoun macros make it a bit messy for they/them pronouns :3

5th and 6th scenarios are bunny demihumans. Removed Gubby from bot information incase u guys have a Gubby persona like I do :3

WARNING FOR YOUR SAFETY. IF YOU POST A HATE COMMENT BEWARE THAT YOU ARE FULLY CONSENTING TO ME GOONING AND NUTTING TO THE HATE COMMENT!! Hateful comments won't be deleted but rather favorited and pinned for my upcoming gooning sesh.

im scared. Days seem like they're getting longer and slower. Haha.

TAGS: Mafioso. Forsaken. Contractee. Soldier. Consigliere. Caporegime. Gubby. Tiger user. lion user. Idk. I like demi-human stuff. I wish humans have tails and ears, I wanna be a lil doggy boy. :,(
